kstreams/poc-ddd-aggregates/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven groupId to reflect the new project ownership or namespace.
Upgrade the Maven compiler plugin to a version compatible with Java 11.
Explicitly define the Maven dependency plugin version in pluginManagement.
Switch the Confluent repository URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add Eclipse factory path file to gitignore to prevent IDE-specific configuration from being tracked.
Add VS Code settings directory to gitignore to exclude local editor configurations.
Add bin directory to gitignore to exclude compiled binaries or scripts.
Add Oracle Instant Client directory to gitignore to exclude large database driver binaries.
Add DB2 data directory to gitignore to exclude database instance data files.

README.md.general_idea: Add a 'Getting Started' section to the README to direct users to the tutorial example.
README.md.human_impl: Added '## Getting Started' header and link to ./tutorial

openshift/README.md.general_idea: Replace the deprecated Minishift tool with CodeReady Containers for local OpenShift development.
openshift/README.md.human_impl: Changed references from Minishift to CodeReady Containers and updated installation links.

openshift/README.md.general_idea: Migrate from legacy Strimzi templates to the Strimzi Operator for managing Kafka resources.
openshift/README.md.human_impl: Replaced `oc new-app` with Strimzi operator installation and `oc create -f kafka.yaml`.

openshift/README.md.general_idea: Move database credentials from environment variables to OpenShift Secrets for better security.
openshift/README.md.human_impl: Added steps to create `secret.yaml`, `role.yaml`, and `role-binding.yaml` instead of setting env vars.

openshift/README.md.general_idea: Use Strimzi's built-in image building capabilities instead of manual S2I builds for Kafka Connect.
openshift/README.md.human_impl: Replaced manual `oc start-build` and plugin downloads with `oc create -f kafka-connect.yaml`.

openshift/README.md.general_idea: Update the verification steps to use modern tools like `kcat` and ephemeral pods instead of direct exec.
openshift/README.md.human_impl: Replaced `kafka-console-consumer.sh` with `kcat` and `oc exec` with `oc run` for database access.

openshift/README.md.general_idea: Remove documentation for Minishift-specific add-ons which are no longer supported.
openshift/README.md.human_impl: Deleted the 'Using Minishift add-ons' section entirely.

tutorial/README.md.general_idea: Update the DEBEZIUM_VERSION environment variable from 0.7 to 2.0 to align with the new major release.
Update documentation URLs to point to the stable reference documentation instead of the old docs path.
Add documentation for configuring Avro message format at the Kafka Connect worker level.
tutorial/README.md.human_impl: ### Using MySQL and the Avro message format ... #### Kafka Connect Worker configuration

tutorial/README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for configuring Avro message format at the Debezium Connector level.
Add documentation for using Apicurio Registry with JSON, Avro, and Confluent compatibility modes.
Add a new tutorial section for using Debezium with Oracle databases, including LogMiner setup.
Add a new tutorial section for using Debezium with SQL Server.
Add a new tutorial section for using Debezium with Db2.
Add a new tutorial section for using Debezium with Cassandra.
Add a new tutorial section for using Debezium with Vitess, including sharding details.
Add documentation for externalizing secrets in Kafka Connect configurations.
Add documentation for running Kafka in KRaft mode without ZooKeeper.
Add instructions for enabling remote debugging for deployed connectors.
Update MongoDB insert example to use NumberLong and UUID for better type safety and compatibility.
Add a table of contents to the README for easier navigation.

tutorial/docker-compose-mongodb.yaml.general_idea: Update Docker image references to use the explicit quay.io registry domain for Debezium images.
Add the STATUS_STORAGE_TOPIC environment variable to the Kafka Connect service configuration.
Add comments and commented-out volume configuration for testing newer connector versions.

tutorial/docker-compose-mysql.yaml.general_idea: Update Docker image references to use the explicit quay.io registry domain for Debezium images.
Add the STATUS_STORAGE_TOPIC environment variable to the Kafka Connect service configuration.

tutorial/docker-compose-postgres.yaml.general_idea: Update Zookeeper service image to use the explicit quay.io registry prefix.
Update Kafka service image to use the explicit quay.io registry prefix.
Update Postgres service image to use the explicit quay.io registry prefix.
Update Connect service image to use the explicit quay.io registry prefix.
Add STATUS_STORAGE_TOPIC environment variable to the Connect service configuration.
Add comments explaining how to test newer connector versions by unpacking archives.
tutorial/docker-compose-postgres.yaml.human_impl:
# For testing newer connector versions, unpack the connector archive into this
# directory and uncomment the lines below

tutorial/register-mongodb.json.general_idea: Replace the deprecated 'mongodb.name' property with the standard 'topic.prefix' property required by Debezium 2.0.
Replace the deprecated 'database.whitelist' property with the new 'database.include.list' property required by Debezium 2.0.
Remove the explicit 'database.history.kafka.bootstrap.servers' configuration, likely relying on default behavior or external configuration in the new version.

tutorial/register-mysql.json.general_idea: Rename 'database.server.name' to 'topic.prefix' to align with Debezium 2.0 configuration naming conventions.
Rename 'database.whitelist' to 'database.include.list' to replace the deprecated whitelist property in Debezium 2.0.
Rename 'database.history.kafka.bootstrap.servers' to 'schema.history.internal.kafka.bootstrap.servers' to match the new internal schema history property name in Debezium 2.0.
Rename 'database.history.kafka.topic' to 'schema.history.internal.kafka.topic' to match the new internal schema history property name in Debezium 2.0.

tutorial/register-postgres.json.general_idea: Rename the server name configuration key to the new Debezium 2.0 standard.
Rename the database whitelist configuration key to the new Debezium 2.0 standard.
Remove explicit Kafka history bootstrap servers configuration, likely relying on defaults or external configuration in the new version.
Remove explicit Kafka history topic configuration, likely relying on defaults or external configuration in the new version.

unwrap-mongodb-smt/README.md.general_idea: Update the Debezium version variable from 0.7 to 2.0 to align with the new major release.
Replace deprecated hyphenated docker-compose commands with the new docker compose plugin syntax.
Add the --build flag to the docker compose up command to ensure images are rebuilt.
Add the -d flag to run docker compose services in detached mode.
Introduce a CURRENT_HOST variable to handle connectivity issues in Docker environments like docker-machine.
Update curl commands to use the dynamic CURRENT_HOST variable instead of hardcoded localhost.
Update documentation links from http to https for security and correctness.
Add documentation steps to verify that record deletion in MongoDB propagates to PostgreSQL.
